data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes interface interactions by placing commonly used functions within easy reach.
data.technical_spec: Larger clickable areas for frequent actions.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes decision time by limiting the number of options presented to users.
data.technical_spec: Simplified navigation menus with hierarchical structure.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Enhances user satisfaction by making interfaces more visually appealing.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Adobe's own design standards for consistency.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designs familiar patterns based on users' experiences with other interfaces.
data.technical_spec: Adopts common web conventions for intuitive user journeys.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related elements together to improve readability and user comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Uses grid layouts to organize content.
